scope: Pakistan Economic Survey commentary extraction from converted Markdown
source_truth_note: Original PDFs remain source truth. Converted Markdown is a working text layer and table/chart/numeric values require separate QA.

field_guidance.sector: Chapter or sector inferred from file/chapter heading.
field_guidance.subsection: Nearest heading when available; empty if unclear.
field_guidance.source_page: Markdown page marker number corresponding to the source PDF page.
field_guidance.source_quote: Short quote sufficient to ground the claim. Do not use long passages.
field_guidance.claim: Concise paraphrase of the source-grounded commentary claim.
field_guidance.topic_tags: Multiple topical labels; use for cross-cutting themes rather than creating many fields.
field_guidance.sentiment_signal: Tone in the source wording, not the model's opinion.
field_guidance.time_orientation: Whether the claim is retrospective, current, future-looking, ongoing, or unclear.
field_guidance.actor: Government, ministry, regulator, institution, province, private sector, donor, or other actor when explicit.
field_guidance.policy_or_programme: Named policy, package, programme, project, operation, framework, or scheme when explicit.
field_guidance.constraint_or_risk: Bottleneck, shock, risk, shortage, vulnerability, or implementation constraint when explicit.
field_guidance.cause: Explicit cause only; leave empty if the model is inferring.
field_guidance.effect: Explicit effect/outcome only; leave empty if the model is inferring.
field_guidance.geography: Province, region, urban/rural area, district, or country comparison when substantive.
field_guidance.numeric_or_table_sensitive: True when the claim depends on exact numbers, tables, charts, rankings, or definitions requiring separate PDF QA.
field_guidance.confidence: Confidence in extraction/classification, not truth of the underlying government claim.
field_guidance.needs_human_review: Default true for this RA workflow.

example_records.source_quote: performance of agriculture sector as a whole remained dismal
example_records.claim: The Survey characterized agriculture sector performance in FY2016 as weak.

example_records.source_quote: bring further efficiency and transparency in the book building process
example_records.claim: SECP regulatory changes were framed as improving efficiency and transparency in book building.
